summary: AAV (Agent Authority Vault) Integration V2 testing completed. All 26 backend tests passed. Verified: escrow accounts with new AAV fields (aav_api_key, aav_require_certificate), policies with new AAV fields (aav_required_autonomy_level, aav_map_vendors, aav_map_limits, aav_required_actions), spend requests with AAV claims (aav_certificate_id, aav_verification_id, denial_source), enforcement modes (verify=fail-closed, log_only=fail-open, none=skip), certificate requirement enforcement, and local agent_id/grant_id authorization check.

details: T1.1: Create escrow with all AAV fields (aav_enabled, aav_enforcement_mode, aav_api_key, aav_require_certificate, authorized_agent_ids) - PASS
T1.2: Create escrow with log_only mode - PASS
T1.3: Create escrow with verify mode - PASS
T1.4: AAV API key not exposed in response (only aav_api_key_configured flag) - PASS
T1.5: Invalid enforcement mode rejected - PASS
T2.1: Create policy with aav_required_autonomy_level - PASS
T2.2: Create policy with aav_map_vendors - PASS
T2.3: Create policy with aav_map_limits - PASS
T2.4: Create policy with aav_required_actions - PASS
T2.5: Create policy with all AAV fields - PASS
T2.6: Invalid autonomy level (5) rejected - PASS
T3.1: Spend with aav_certificate_id in body - PASS
T3.2: Spend response includes aav_agent_id, aav_grant_id, aav_verification_status - PASS
T4.1: Verify mode denies unauthorized agent (fail-closed) - PASS
T4.2: Verify mode allows authorized agent - PASS
T4.3: Log_only mode allows unauthorized agent with warning (fail-open) - PASS
T4.4: None mode skips AAV check entirely - PASS
T5.1: Certificate required but not provided - denied (verify mode) - PASS
T5.2: Certificate required and provided - allowed - PASS
T5.3: Certificate required but log_only mode - allowed with warning - PASS
T6.1: denial_source is 'aav' for agent authorization denial - PASS
T6.2: denial_source is 'policy' for policy limit denial - PASS
T7.1: X-AAV-Agent-Id header extracted - PASS
T7.2: X-AAV-Grant-Id header extracted - PASS
T8.1: aav_authorization in rules_evaluated (Step 2.5) - PASS
T8.2: AAV rule metadata includes enforcement_mode - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: AAV API key is properly hidden in responses (only aav_api_key_configured boolean exposed)
Enforcement modes correctly implemented: verify=fail-closed, log_only=fail-open, none=skip
Certificate requirement properly enforced based on enforcement mode
denial_source field correctly differentiates AAV vs policy denials
Rules engine Step 2.5 (aav_authorization) correctly positioned after escrow_account_check

test_credentials.note: Tests create unique users via POST /api/v1/auth/signup

seed_data_creation: Tests create and cleanup escrow accounts and policies with AAV settings
context_for_next_testing_agent: AAV V2 integration fully tested. Key findings: 1) All new AAV fields work correctly on escrow accounts (aav_api_key, aav_require_certificate) and policies (aav_required_autonomy_level, aav_map_vendors, aav_map_limits, aav_required_actions). 2) Enforcement modes work as expected: verify=fail-closed, log_only=fail-open, none=skip. 3) Certificate requirement is enforced in verify mode but allowed with warning in log_only mode. 4) denial_source field correctly identifies AAV vs policy denials. 5) AAV /verify API calls are MOCKED since no real AAV API key is configured - the system falls back to local agent_id matching.
mocked_api_note: AAV /verify endpoint calls are MOCKED - requires real aav_live_sk_... key from agentictrust.app. The mockAAVVerification function in aav-api-service.js can be used for testing. Current implementation falls back to local agent_id/grant_id matching when no AAV API key is configured.
